task_completion.description: Read the upgrade specification document to get the dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Desktop/upgrade_spec.txt'.

task_completion.description: Create the Core stage using a Fuselage/Pod component and set its length.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Fuselage/Pod component added to the OpenVSP geometry browser, with its length parameter set to 25.0m in the Design/Parm window.

task_completion.description: Create the Solid Rocket Booster (SRB) using a Fuselage/Pod component and set its length.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A second Fuselage/Pod component added to the geometry browser, with its length parameter set to 15.0m.

task_completion.description: Apply the correct spatial offsets to the SRB component.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SRB component's location parameters (X Loc and Y Loc) set to an X-offset of 10.0m and a Y-offset of 2.2m.

task_completion.description: Apply rotational symmetry to the SRB component.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Sym' tab in the geometry window showing 'Axial' or 'Rotational' symmetry enabled for the SRB, OR the 3D workspace visually displaying multiple SRBs arranged in a circular pattern around the core.

task_completion.description: Save the completed model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog saving the file to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/heavy_launch_vehicle.vsp3', or the OpenVSP main window title bar updating to show 'heavy_launch_vehicle.vsp3'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenVSP graphical interface to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through OpenVSP menus, the geometry browser, and parameter windows, rather than using a terminal script to generate the XML/vsp3 file.

integrity.description: Verify the 3D model actually renders in the workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OpenVSP 3D view should display the rocket components (the central core and the offset SRBs) updating as parameters are entered.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the application by directly writing the save file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal commands (like 'echo' or 'cp') used to create '/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/heavy_launch_vehicle.vsp3'. The save action must occur within the OpenVSP GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target dimensions from the spec: Core length = 25.0m. SRB length = 15.0m, X-offset = 10.0m, Y-offset = 2.2m. The model must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/heavy_launch_vehicle.vsp3. Note: In OpenVSP v3, rotational symmetry is typically managed under 'Axial' symmetry settings in the UI.
